\n## Obtain your Calendly Personal Token:
## Obtain your Calendly Personal Token
1. Go to https://calendly.com/integrations/api_webhooks
2. Click on "Create New Token"
3. Copy the token and paste it in the field below
Get the connected Calendly user profile,: Get the connected Calendly user profile, including organization URI.
List active Calendly event types for the: List active Calendly event types for the connected user.
Get details for a Calendly event type, i: Get details for a Calendly event type, including scheduling_url and duration.
List bookable time slots for an event ty: List bookable time slots for an event type (max 7-day range per Calendly API).
List busy/blocked times for a user from: List busy/blocked times for a user from connected calendars. Range must be in the future and max 7 days.
Get availability schedules and date over: Get availability schedules and date overrides for a Calendly user.
Get the public scheduling URL for an eve: Get the public scheduling URL for an event type or the user's main booking page.
Build Calendly embed HTML for an event t: Build Calendly embed HTML for an event type scheduling page. Use this to drop Calendly booking into an external website.
List scheduled Calendly events for the c: List scheduled Calendly events for the connected account.
Get details for a scheduled Calendly eve: Get details for a scheduled Calendly event by UUID or URI.
List invitees for a scheduled Calendly e: List invitees for a scheduled Calendly event.
Get a single invitee on a scheduled Cale: Get a single invitee on a scheduled Calendly event.
Get cancel and reschedule URLs for an in: Get cancel and reschedule URLs for an invitee. Calendly has no API to directly reschedule or edit a booked event — use these links or cancel and rebook.
Get no-show record details for an invite: Get no-show record details for an invitee.
List members in the connected user's Cal: List members in the connected user's Calendly organization.
Get details for a specific organization: Get details for a specific organization membership.
List Calendly webhook subscriptions. Use: List Calendly webhook subscriptions. Useful for debugging webhook triggers.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers when a new Calendly event is sc: Triggers when a new Calendly event is scheduled
Triggers when a new Calendly event is ca: Triggers when a new Calendly event is canceled
